steps.title: Spot the scope indicator
steps.content: The question asks to emphasize the scope of Basquiat's work — the breadth and scale of his artistic output. The notes provide the key signal: “more than two thousand drawings and paintings.”

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice A captures the scope emphasis through contrast: Mater is framed as “just one of more than two thousand drawings and paintings,” which highlights how vast his total output was. Choices B, C, and D abandon this comparison, focusing instead on materials, price, and timing. That matches choice A — A is correct.
